tool_input.command:
cat "/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work2/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-feature-details.json" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
# Print specific sections: s2 (input validation), s3 (db access)
for s in data.get('sections', []):
    if s['id'] in ['s2', 's3']:
        print(f'--- {s[\"id\"]}: {s[\"title\"]} ---')
        print(s['content'][:2000])
        print()
"
